_ops_available: search          — requires: query (string); optional: filter ({ value: 'page'|'database', property: 'object' }), page_size
create_page     — requires: parent ({ database_id or page_id }), properties, children (optional)
query_database  — requires: database_id; optional: filter, sorts, page_size
update_block    — requires: block_id, block (Notion block object)
append_blocks   — requires: block_id (parent page id), children (array of Notion block objects)
